creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
XPlanet is a cool "replacement" for xearth. It does
_REAL_ 3D rendering, mostly with the help of the
Mesa OpenGL libraries.

Special thanks goes to Daniel O'Connor <darius@dons.net.au>,
who originally figured out how to get around the .ppm
problem that I was having trouble with when I worked on
this port a couple weeks ago. I'm going to leave his name
and email as the original port creator. His machine also
ensured that xplanet works on 2.2.8-STABLE as well.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to import the new port to the tree.
